description: Canonical paper-arch list — single source of truth for which (arch_id, k_win) cells appear in the paper's leaderboard and T-sweep artefacts. Cell key is (subject_model, arch_id, seed, k_win); each leaderboard entry below is a (arch_id, k_win) pair, evaluated across both subject models and the seed priority below.

probing_methodology.comment: All paper cells must be probed under this methodology. 'old' methodology rows in the manifest (Phase 5/5B's last_position / mean_pool / full_window at S=20) do NOT qualify and must be re-probed.

leaderboard_archs.comment: TFA full (predictive + novel codes) — Lubana et al. 2025 reference.
Faithful T-SAE port (Ye et al. 2025) at the paper's native k=20 sparsity.
Faithful T-SAE port at our k convention (k_win=500) for fair cross-arch comparison.
Dense MLC at Phase 7 k_win=500; per-layer label k_pos=100 is purely descriptive (single shared TopK).
Sparse MLC at Phase 5 density (k_win=100). Phase 5 IT ckpts already exist at this density (k_win=100 was Phase 5's only knob); base-side equivalent must be trained from scratch.
Dense agentic MLC (multi-scale contrastive, n_scales=3, gamma=0.5) at k_win=500.
Sparse agentic MLC at k_win=100 (Phase 5 density). Phase 5 IT ckpts exist; base-side must be trained from scratch.
Barebones TXC at T=5 (T-sweep peak point and one of the two T-sweep anchor archs).
Barebones TXC at T=16 (mid-T point; tests T-scaling claim at 3× the peak T).
Best TXC variant from Phase 5 — H8 stack (matryoshka H/L + multi-distance InfoNCE) + subseq sampling. mp/lp 3-seed champion in Phase 5.
Best Phase 7 single-cell at k_feat=20 (mean AUC 0.9358 on base). Barebones TXC + tsae-paper anti-dead stack only.
Best Phase 7 single-cell at k_feat=5 (mean AUC 0.8989 on base). H8 multidistance recipe = anti-dead + matryoshka H/L + multi-distance InfoNCE with auto-scaled shifts.

tsweep_T_cap.rationale: Both barebones and hill-climbed T-sweeps cap at T=32. Beyond this (e.g., row 49 phase5b_subseq_h8_T64_s5) is permanently infeasible on A40 — see 2026-04-28-a40-feasibility.md.

tsweep_barebones.comment: Existing Phase 7 T-sweep (preserved). All cells trained on base at seed=42 + seed=1; partial seed=2 for T=3..10. Carries forward unchanged.

a40_feasibility.rationale: single-layer cache (14 GB) + W+Adam (T·d_in·d_sae·8B/param × 2 sides) + workspace. T=32 hits 50 GB at b=4096; b=2048 doesn't recover enough — needs CPU-RAM cache streaming.

tsweep_barebones.results_source: experiments/phase7_unification/results/probing_results.jsonl — filter rows where arch_id matches 'txcdr_t<T>' for T in T_values AND S=32. results_manifest.json summarises coverage.

tsweep_hillclimbed.comment: H8 multidistance recipe: TXC + anti-dead + matryoshka H/L (H = 0.2·d_sae) + multi-distance InfoNCE. Family-mean #1 in Phase 7 leaderboard at k_feat=20 (tightest cluster, 0.0038 spread).

a40_feasibility.rationale: H8 adds matryoshka H decoder (~10% extra over plain TXC) and a small multi-distance pair tensor (negligible). Footprint at T=32: cache 14 + W+Adam 35.9 + workspace ≈ 50 GB.

tsweep_hillclimbed.rationale_for_choice: Hill-climbed family selected as phase57_partB_h8_bare_multidistance because: (i) family-mean #1 in Phase 7 unified leaderboard at k_feat=20 (tightest cluster, 0.0038 spread); (ii) T=8 is paper good_txc_p7_k5 — the T-sweep gives that anchor full context; (iii) 7 of 16 cells already trained, only 9 missing — minimum new compute vs the txc_bare_antidead and SubseqH8 alternatives.

alternatives_rejected.txc_bare_antidead_t<T>: Only T=5,10,20 trained — would need 13 new trainings (full sweep). More compute, less differentiation from barebones (anti-dead only).
alternatives_rejected.phase5b_subseq_h8_T_max<T>: Only T_max=10,12 trained — would need 14 new trainings. T_max=64 permanently lost on A40 anyway.

tsweep_hillclimbed.results_source: experiments/phase7_unification/results/probing_results.jsonl — filter rows where arch_id matches 'phase57_partB_h8_bare_multidistance_t<T>' for T in T_values AND S=32. results_manifest.json summarises coverage.
